case_title: ALAN MUSGROVE VS. TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSGROVE, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSGROVE, ALAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY RESULTED FROM A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF WHICH DEFENDANTS WERE AWARE OR SHOULD HAVE KNOWN ABOUT, BUT FAILED TO REPAIR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MUSGROVE, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMPED SERVED AUG-07-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CITY/COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON 09/19/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-17-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ALAN MUSGROVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TUTOR PERINI CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY PATRICK JENNINGS, PROJECT MANAGER. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
